name: Stock Urgency Ranking

data.dsp_query: SELECT sku, category, current_stock, projected_daily_demand, CEIL(current_stock::float / NULLIF(projected_daily_demand, 0)) AS days_of_cover FROM public.stock_level WHERE current_stock < 100 ORDER BY days_of_cover ASC LIMIT 10

semantic.cypher: MATCH (s:Sku {supplier_lead_days: {lead_days}}) RETURN s.sku, s.supplier_id, s.supplier_lead_days LIMIT 20
